content: Just as the lexical meaning of "reflexion" encompasses both physical light reflection and deliberate human cognitive reflection, LLM self-reflection mechanisms can be expanded to integrate two complementary modes: a passive "reflection mode" that mirrors inconsistent outputs from different solving perspectives like a mirror reflects light, and an active "reflection mode" that revises prior reasoning like deliberate human self-reflection. This dual framework can resolve the limitation of current single-perspective self-reflection that often reinforces existing logical errors.
